title: PTD Accuses NUPENG’s Three-Man Reconciliation Committee Of Bias, Vows To Continue Litigations - FinancialEDGE
description: The protracted leadership crisis in the Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has lingered into the 5th month of 2025, with the Union taking a swipe at the parent body for teleguiding and coercing a three-man Committee which sought to reconcile NUPENG leadership and the aggrieved members of the PTD faction, led by Comrade
html: The protracted leadership crisis in the Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has lingered into the 5th month of 2025, with the Union taking a swipe at the parent body for teleguiding and coercing a three-man Committee which sought to reconcile NUPENG leadership and the aggrieved members of the PTD faction, led by Comrade Lucky Osesua.
